name: Dynapack International Technology Corporation
summary: Dynapack International Technology Corporation designs, manufactures, and supplies portable battery packs in Taiwan. The company offers its products for various applications, including notebook/ultrabook PCs, tablet PCs/e-books, smartphones, handy scanners, 2-way radios, power banks, cable modems, server UPSs, and e-bike batteries. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in Taoyuan, Taiwan.
